name: Zucchini Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz. cream of chicken soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine zucchini and onion in a medium saucepan. Add water to cover and bring to a boil.
2. Boil for 5 minutes; drain and cool.
3. In a large bowl, combine carrots, soup, sour cream, and garlic powder.
4. Add the cooled zucchini/onion mixture and chicken; mix well.
5. Spread the mixture in a buttered 13x9 inch baking dish.
6. To prepare the topping, melt butter in a skillet. Add bread stuffing and seasoning packet, and toss well.
7. Sprinkle the stuffing over the casserole.
8. Top with cheese if desired.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until golden brown. Yield: 6-8 servings.
